vocab.meaning: một thành tựu đáng tự hào
vocab.example: For many entrepreneurs, owning a limited-edition Rolex is seen as a feather in their cap after years of hard work.

vocab.meaning: ăn mặc cực kỳ sang trọng, chỉnh tề
vocab.example: When people dress to the nines for high-profile galas, an expensive watch is the ultimate finishing touch.

vocab.meaning: vô cùng hữu ích hoặc giá trị
vocab.example: To a serious collector, a rare vintage timepiece is worth its weight in gold due to its historical significance.

vocab.meaning: đua đòi, cố gắng bằng bạn bằng bè
vocab.example: In some social circles, people buy luxury watches simply to keep up with the Joneses and maintain their social standing.

vocab.meaning: tốn rất nhiều tiền (thường dùng phủ định)
vocab.example: While a standard watch is fine, some elites don't mind breaking the bank to acquire a piece with tourbillon complications.

vocab.meaning: phần bổ sung làm mọi thứ trở nên hoàn hảo hơn
vocab.example: If a person is already wearing a tailored suit, a luxury watch is really the icing on the cake for their professional look.
Handcrafted Swiss watches usually cost a pretty penny, but their durability justifies the initial outlay.

vocab.meaning: trông rất lôi cuốn và sang trọng
vocab.example: Wearing a high-end designer watch can make an individual feel and look a million dollars in a business meeting.

vocab.word: separate the wheat from the chaff
vocab.meaning: phân biệt người/vật vượt trội với những thứ tầm thường
vocab.example: In the world of horology, expensive mechanical movements separate the wheat from the chaff of mass-produced quartz watches.

vocab.meaning: làm ai đó trở nên nổi bật/khác biệt
vocab.example: The unique craftsmanship of a bespoke watch can truly set someone apart from the crowd in terms of style.
